heading: Sergeant at Arms of House; additional compensation
label: 5601 Sergeant at Arms of House; additional compensation
text: The Sergeant at Arms of the House of Representatives shall receive, directly or indirectly, no fees or other compensation or emolument whatever for performing the duties of the office, or in connection therewith, otherwise than the salary prescribed by law.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 77 of this title
